Our Story

Born on the Block

What started as a dream and a grill became Westchester's worst-kept secret. The Chopping Block serves up smash burgers with crispy edges, hand-breaded fried chicken, and a house-made bacon jam that people can't stop talking about.

Every patty is smashed fresh to order. Every bun is toasted golden. Every bite is built to make you come back. We're not trying to reinvent the burger — we're trying to perfect it.

Born on the Block

The story behind Miami's favorite smash burger truck

The Chopping Block Miami didn't start in a boardroom or a corporate kitchen — it started with a simple belief that Miami deserved a better smash burger. Nick, the founder and head chef, turned a neighborhood food truck into one of Westchester's most talked-about spots, earning a 4.9-star rating across 83 Google reviews in just two years.

Every night from Wednesday to Sunday, the truck fires up on SW 87th Ave, drawing crowds from Westchester, Coral Way, University Park, and beyond. The secret? Fresh Angus beef, hand-smashed on a screaming-hot griddle. House-made bacon jam. Sauces made in-house. And a crew that treats every burger like it's the one that'll make someone a customer for life.

"We take pride in not smashing our burgers to a crisp" isn't just a motto — it's the philosophy that sets TCB apart. Crispy edges, juicy center, maximum flavor. No shortcuts. No heat lamps. No compromise.

Nick — Founder
Serving the block
